audit_status.source_base: Greek Revelation text tradition with Eden/Ezekiel river-tree imagery; draft aligned later
audit_status.review_note: Compact complete draft reviewed for river, tree of life, no curse, seeing face, final witness, invitation, warning, grace.

verses.restored: And he showed me river of water of life, bright as crystal, going out from throne of Divine and of Lamb.
In midst of its street and on either side of river, tree of life making twelve fruits, giving its fruit according to each month, and leaves of tree are for healing of nations.
And every curse will no longer be; throne of Divine and Lamb will be in it, and his servants will serve/worship him.
They will see his face, and his name will be upon their foreheads.
Night will be no more, and they have no need of lamp-light or sun-light, because Lord Divine will shine upon them, and they will reign into ages of ages.
He said to me: These words are trustworthy and true, and Lord, the Divine of spirits of prophets, sent his messenger to show his servants what must happen in swiftness.
And look, I come quickly. Blessed is the one keeping words of prophecy of this scroll.
And I, John, am the one hearing and seeing these things; and when I heard and saw, I fell to worship before feet of messenger showing me these things.
And he says to me: Do not do that. I am fellow servant with you and your siblings the prophets and those keeping words of this scroll. Worship the Divine.
And he says to me: Do not seal words of prophecy of this scroll, for the season is near.
Let the one doing injustice still do injustice, and the filthy still be filthy, and the righteous/just still do righteousness/justice, and the holy still be holy.
Look, I come quickly, and my wage/reward is with me, to repay each as one's work is.
I am Alpha and Omega, first and last, beginning and completion.
Blessed are those washing their robes, so that their authority will be upon tree of life and they may enter gates into city.
Outside are dogs and sorcerers and sexually misusing and murderers and idolaters and everyone loving and doing falsehood.
I, Jesus, sent my messenger to witness these things to you for assemblies. I am root and offspring of David, bright morning star.
And Spirit and bride say: Come. And the one hearing, let say: Come. And the thirsty one, let come; the one willing, let take water of life freely.
I witness to everyone hearing words of prophecy of this scroll: if anyone adds to them, the Divine will add upon that one plagues written in this scroll.
And if anyone takes away from words of scroll of this prophecy, the Divine will take away that one's part from tree of life and holy city, written in this scroll.
The One witnessing these things says: Yes, I come quickly. Amen. Come, Lord Jesus.
The grace of Lord Jesus be with all.

translation_notes: The final vision is Eden restored and expanded: river, tree of life, healing of nations, no curse.
The final invitation is open: Spirit and bride say Come; the thirsty receive freely.
Text-warning concerns this prophetic scroll and should not be used to shut down responsible textual criticism.
safety_note: Revelation ends not with fear but invitation, healing of nations, face-to-face Divine presence, and grace with all.
